body: Rev. Dawson confirmed she can do January 3. Topic is grief ministry and the role of presence. Please add her to the studio access list and send the standard guest prep packet.
Done - confirmation email sent to angela.dawson@gmail.com. Studio access added for January 3 starting 5:30 AM. Prep packet included.
Following up on the Covenant Insurance Group January invoice. It was due February 1 per our sponsor agreement. Please resend to rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org.
Looking into it now. Covenant's billing contact has been notified. Should have the PDF to you by end of day Friday.
My January bill is $112.40 and I see a $22.40 roaming charge. I have not traveled outside my service area. This needs to be investigated and credited back.
We have reviewed the charge. It appears to be a data roaming flag from January 2 when the device connected to a tower near the Tennessee-Arkansas border. Submitting the credit request now.

Pastor Greer wants the volunteer signup ready well ahead of the event. I have a draft schedule for 18 volunteers across four stations - first aid, blood pressure screening, vision, and nutrition info. Can you share the template?
I will get the template to you by January 20, Deacon Mosley. Also connecting you with Lisa Moore who has offered to staff the nutrition table again this year.
Amazon tracking shows delivered January 8 at 2:14 PM but there is nothing at my door or in the mailbox. My address is 1847 Young Ave, Memphis TN 38104. Please open a missing package investigation.

Submitting Q1 CPE hours: 6 hrs chaplaincy ethics seminar (Feb 14), 5 hrs palliative care workshop (Mar 7), 3 hrs interdisciplinary team training (Jan 23). Total 14 hours. Previous balance was 14 hours so running total should now be 28.
Received. Documentation reviewed and accepted. Your updated CPE hour balance for 2026 is 28 hours. 22 hours remaining to meet the December 31 deadline of 50 hours.

Holiday flowers for Dorothy Price - please change delivery address to 2847 South Parkway East, Memphis TN 38114. The order was placed under my account rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org on December 18.
Address corrected. The arrangement will be delivered to 2847 South Parkway East on December 22 between 10 AM and 2 PM. Confirmation will go to rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org.

Internet went down at 4:50 AM on Saturday December 27 - right when I was preparing for the 7 AM show. It did not come back until after 7:30. I lost the ability to coordinate with TJ and pull segment notes. Please credit my account for the outage.
Credit of $4.33 applied for the 2.5-hour outage window. It will appear on the next billing cycle.

The February 8 episode on Seasons of Waiting is missing from our shared drive folder. I need it for the anniversary compilation. The show ran from 7:00 to 9:00 AM and featured a devotional reading from Henri Nouwen.
Found the archive. The file was in the backup folder under a different naming convention. Uploading the MP3 now and sharing the link to rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org.

The resident scheduled for January 24 overnight call has a family obligation. I would like to swap coverage with the other resident who has January 30. Both residents are aware and agree. Requesting Dr. Vickers approval.

Rebecca, the fall festival is October 31 and we want you to emcee again. Can you confirm your availability and let us know if the parking lot reservation request has been submitted to the facilities team?

A listener named Carolyn wrote in asking for the resource list from the December 27 episode on Seasons of Waiting. Can you send me the show notes so I can pull the book titles and Scripture references she mentioned?

Resources from that episode: Henri Nouwen A Letter of Consolation, Psalm 27, and Brené Brown Atlas of the Heart. I will draft a short response letter for the listener mailbox. Give me until Wednesday.
I see a charge for STREAMACCESS PRO $34.99 on January 3. I have never signed up for this service. Please dispute this charge and block any future charges from this merchant on my Discover account.

My 2021 Toyota Camry is due for an oil change. I prefer Saturday January 24 after 9:30 AM - the radio show ends at 9 AM and I can come directly from the Beale Street studio. Please confirm availability.

The Morning Reflections anniversary episode is the last Saturday of March. Seven years on air. I want a longer block - 2.5 hours instead of the usual 2. We need the 2019 launch clips from the archive. TJ please confirm the studio booking.

Studio booked for 5:30 AM to 10 AM on March 28. The 2019 launch clips are loaded on the board. Covenant Insurance Group and Mitchell's Flowers have both confirmed their spots for the anniversary broadcast.
